'''âzh-n-g''' ('''kazhanag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knifecrime|knifecrime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knifecrime|knifecrime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhanag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhanag|thizhanag]] || [[word:jizhanag|jizhanag]] || [[word:shizhanag|shizhanag]] || [[word:kizhanag|kizhanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhanag|thuthuzhanag]] || [[word:jujuzhanag|jujuzhanag]] || [[word:shushuzhanag|shushuzhanag]] || [[word:kukuzhanag|kukuzhanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhanag|thuzhanag]] || [[word:juzhanag|juzhanag]] || [[word:shuzhanag|shuzhanag]] || [[word:kuzhanag|kuzhanag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhanag|thuzhanag]] || [[word:juzhanag|juzhanag]] || [[word:shuzhanag|shuzhanag]] || [[word:kuzhanag|kuzhanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhanag|thezhanag]] || [[word:jezhanag|jezhanag]] || [[word:shezhanag|shezhanag]] || [[word:kezhanag|kezhanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhanag|thothozhanag]] || [[word:jojozhanag|jojozhanag]] || [[word:shoshozhanag|shoshozhanag]] || [[word:kokozhanag|kokozhanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhanag|thozhanag]] || [[word:jozhanag|jozhanag]] || [[word:shozhanag|shozhanag]] || [[word:kozhanag|kozhanag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhanag|thozhanag]] || [[word:jozhanag|jozhanag]] || [[word:shozhanag|shozhanag]] || [[word:kozhanag|kozhanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhanag|thĂŠzhanag]] || [[word:jĂŠzhanag|jĂŠzhanag]] || [[word:shĂŠzhanag|shĂŠzhanag]] || [[word:kĂŠzhanag|kĂŠzhanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhanag|thathazhanag]] || [[word:jajazhanag|jajazhanag]] || [[word:shashazhanag|shashazhanag]] || [[word:kakazhanag|kakazhanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhanag|thazhanag]] || [[word:jazhanag|jazhanag]] || [[word:shazhanag|shazhanag]] || [[word:kazhanag|kazhanag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhanag|thazhanag]] || [[word:jazhanag|jazhanag]] || [[word:shazhanag|shazhanag]] || [[word:kazhanag|kazhanag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhanag|shazhanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhanag|goshazhanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhanag|gokishazhanag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhanagnĂŒ|shazhanagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanagnknĂŒ|goshazhanagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanagnĂŒ|gokishazhanagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhanagshĂ«|shazhanagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkshĂ«|goshazhanagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhanagshĂ«|gokishazhanagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanagro|shazhanagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkro|goshazhanagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanagro|gokishazhanagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanagmu|shazhanagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkmu|goshazhanagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanagmu|gokishazhanagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhanagsher|shazhanagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhanagnksher|goshazhanagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhanagsher|gokishazhanagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhanagng|shazhanagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkng|goshazhanagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhanagng|gokishazhanagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhanagya|shazhanagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkya|goshazhanagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhanagya|gokishazhanagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhanagyam|shazhanagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkyam|goshazhanagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhanagyam|gokishazhanagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanagnĂŒshĂ«|shazhanagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhanagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhanagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanagnĂŒro|shazhanagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanagnknĂŒro|goshazhanagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanagnĂŒro|gokishazhanagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanagnĂŒmu|shazhanagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanagnknĂŒmu|goshazhanagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanagnĂŒmu|gokishazhanagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanagshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhanagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhanagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhanagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanagshĂ«ro|shazhanagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkshĂ«ro|goshazhanagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanagshĂ«ro|gokishazhanagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanagshĂ«mu|shazhanagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkshĂ«mu|goshazhanagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanagshĂ«mu|gokishazhanagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanagronĂŒ|shazhanagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkronĂŒ|goshazhanagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanagronĂŒ|gokishazhanagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanagroshĂ«|shazhanagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkroshĂ«|goshazhanagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanagroshĂ«|gokishazhanagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhanagromu|shazhanagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkromu|goshazhanagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhanagromu|gokishazhanagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhanagmunĂŒ|shazhanagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkmunĂŒ|goshazhanagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhanagmunĂŒ|gokishazhanagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhanagmushĂ«|shazhanagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkmushĂ«|goshazhanagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhanagmushĂ«|gokishazhanagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhanagmuro|shazhanagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhanagnkmuro|goshazhanagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhanagmuro|gokishazhanagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
